relations: Forensic science provides evidence that aids in the investigation and prosecution within the criminal justice system
DNA profiling is one of the techniques used in forensic science to analyze physical evidence
Biology is one of the disciplines that forensic science uses to analyze evidence
Chemistry is utilized in forensic science for evidence analysis
Physics is incorporated into forensic science for evidence examination
Mathematics is used in forensic science for evidence analysis and crime solving
Microscopy is a technique used in forensic science for evidence collection and analysis
Spectroscopy is employed in forensic science for the analysis of evidence
Chromatography is a technique used in forensic science for analyzing complex mixtures
